# Kamino Liquidity Key Themes Summary

Kamino emphasizes yield generation across correlated and volatile asset pairs through actively managed liquidity vaults. Products include wfragJTO-JTO (10% APY), hyUSD pairs (7.5x points), JitoSOL-SOL (~6% APY), TRUMP-SOL (195% incentive APY), and NX8 (34% APY). Core features: minimal impermanent loss, concentrated liquidity positioning, automatic rebalancing, and multi-layer yield from fees, incentives, and restaking.
